name: Adept of the Waves
text: Action: Choose a character – for this phase, that character gains covert during [element-water] conflicts. (Whenever you declare a conflict with one or more attackers with covert, choose a character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.)

versions.flavor: "Water is flexible and yielding, yet none can withstand the crashing waves."

name: Against the Waves
text: Action: Choose a Shugenja character you control – bow or ready that character. Errata from the Imperial Law (2020-01-06)

versions.flavor: Water is ever changing. A gentle wave one moment and a torrent of force the next.

name: Asako Togama
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an unclaimed ring - switch that ring with a ring in your claimed ring pool and gain all fate on it. (Retain the ring's conflict type.)

versions.flavor: "Never overlook knowledge when you find it, no matter how lowly its source."

name: Asako Tsuki
text: Reaction: After the [element-water] ring is claimed, choose a Scholar character – honor that character.

versions.flavor: "History is fixed, but the future flows."

name: Assassination
text: Conflict Action: Lose 3 honor. Choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower – discard that character. (Max 1 per round.)

versions.flavor: Steel whispered through silk and flesh. In the morning, they would find the body and speak of shadows and dishonor — but tonight, the deed was done.

name: Banzai!
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – that character gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. You may lose 1 honor to resolve this ability twice. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Clarity of Purpose
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character you control – until the end of that conflict, opponents' card effects cannot bow that character and it does not bow as a result of conflict resolution during [conflict-political] conflicts.

name: Consumed by Five Fires
text: Seeker role only. Action: If you control a Shugenja character – remove up to 5 fate from among characters an opponent controls.

versions.flavor: "By these fires be cleansed." – Isawa Masahiro

name: Display of Power
text: Reaction: After you lose an unopposed conflict – cancel the ring effect of that conflict. Then, you resolve that ring effect as if you had won the conflict as the attacking player. Claim that ring.

name: Earth Becomes Sky
text: Earth role only. Reaction: After a character an opponent controls is readied - bow that character.

versions.flavor: "I used to look up to the heavens, but the earth seems to have decided it wants that position."

name: Ethereal Dreamer
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose a ring – until the end of this phase, this character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political] while that ring is being contested.

name: Feral Ningyo
text: Action: During a [element-water] conflict – put this character into play from your hand in the conflict. At the end of the conflict, shuffle it into your conflict deck.

versions.flavor: The sea's embrace is cold and sharp.

name: Forgotten Library
text: Reaction: After the draw phase begins – draw 1 card.

versions.flavor: Truth cannot be lost, only forgotten.

name: Fushichō
text: No attachments. Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose a [clan-phoenix] character in your dynasty pile – put that character into play with 1 fate on it.

name: Isawa Tadaka
text: [clan-crab] and [clan-phoenix] only. Disguised Shugenja. Action: During a conflict, remove one or more characters in your dynasty discard pile from the game - look at that many random cards from your opponent's hand. Choose and discard one of those cards.

name: Isawa Ujina
text: Forced Reaction: After the [element-void] ring is claimed, choose a character with no fate - remove that character from the game. (Unlimited.)

versions.flavor: Had she killed him? But there was not blood on the ninjato's blade. Nor was there a body... He was gone-- whoever he was.

name: Kirei-ko
text: Reaction: After a character your opponent controls triggers an ability - bow that character.

versions.flavor: "The deadliest poison produces the most beautiful shade."

name: Kudaka
text: Reaction: After you claim the [element-air] ring – gain 1 fate and draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.)

versions.flavor: "It's tradition, this, just askin' the kami for their aid."

name: Kyūden Isawa
text: Action: During a conflict, bow this stronghold and discard a Spell event from your hand – play a Spell event from your conflict discard pile as if it were in your hand. Remove that event from the game. Errata from the Imperial Law (2020-01-06)

name: Manicured Garden
text: Conflict Action: Gain 1 fate.

versions.flavor: The perfect garden maintains all five elements in harmony.
“In equilibrium, beauty is revealed.”

name: Meddling Mediator
text: Action: If an opponent has declared 2 or more conflicts against you this phase, select one – take 1 fate or 1 honor from that opponent.

versions.flavor: “Among the Phoenix peace is a highly-valued commodity, and I its humble merchant.”

name: Meditations on the Tao
text: Conflict Action: Choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.

versions.flavor: "Appreciation of beauty is the beginning of wisdom." - Tao of Shinsei

"The motion of the Tao is the return
The way of the Tao is yielding
All things under the Sky come from existence
All that exists comes out of Nothing"
— Laozi

name: Offerings to the Kami
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a ring in the unclaimed ring pool - resolve that ring's effects and claim it as a [conflict-political] ring, gaining all fate on it.

name: Oracle of Stone
text: Action: Each player draws 2 cards. Then, each player discards 2 cards from his or her hand. Errata from RRG v1.7

versions.flavor: Pray it does not foretell disaster.

name: Pacifism
text: Peaceful. (This card cannot be played during a conflict.) Attached character cannot participate in [conflict-military] conflicts.

versions.flavor: A peaceful environment leads to a peaceful mind.
In Crane courts and Phoenix temples alike, the gentle path is honored above all.

name: Prodigy of the Waves
text: Action: While the [element-water] ring is claimed – ready this character.

versions.flavor: "To adapt and flow around any problem, this is the lesson of water." – Isawa’s Elements

name: Public Forum
text: Cannot be a stronghold province. Interrupt: When this province would be broken, if there are no honor tokens on it – place 1 honor token on it instead.

versions.flavor: In the silent courtyard, one can almost hear the clamor of history — a thousand years of Hantei rule, now calling out for young Botan.

name: Seeker of Earth
text: You may replace 1 province of any element with an additional [element-earth] province while deckbuilding. Reaction: After an [element-earth] province you control is revealed – gain 1 fate.

name: Shiba Tetsu
text: Reaction: After you play a Spell card during a conflict – until the end of the conflict, this character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political]. (Unlimited.)

versions.flavor: All that matters is that I server my clan as best I am able.

name: Shiba Tsukune
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends – resolve the ring effects of up to 2 unclaimed rings as if you were the attacking player.

versions.flavor: "I will do my best."

name: Shiba Yōjimbō
text: Interrupt: When the effects of a triggered ability that targets a Shugenja you control would initiate – cancel those effects.

name: Shrine Maiden
text: Reaction: After this character enters play, reveal the top 3 cards of your conflict deck – add each Spell and each Kihō card revealed by this ability to your hand and discard the rest.

versions.flavor: "My family has protected this shrine for generations, and we shall protect it for generations more."

name: Stolen Breath
text:
This attachment cannot be played during a conflict.
Attached character cannot participate in [conflict-political] conflicts.

versions.flavor: "You truly have nothing to say on the matter?"

name: Supernatural Storm
text: Action: Choose a participating character – that character gets +X[conflict-military] and +X[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict. X is equal to the number of Shugenja characters you control.

name: The Imperial Palace
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
This holding adds +3 to your side during each glory count.

name: The Path of Man
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict by 5 or more skill – gain 2 fate.

versions.flavor:
"It is the nature of man to walk the path. It is the nature of man to turn from the path. This is the nature of man."
- Shinsei's Gift, apocryphal

name: Vassal Fields
text: Action: During a conflict at this province - your opponent loses 1 fate.

versions.flavor: "New daimyō, same tax."
"Does the child not have a right to define the future they wish to see?"
